FR-01.title: Student Enrollment
requirements: Online admission form with personal and academic details
Document upload for transcripts and ID
acceptance_criteria: Form submitted with all required fields

FR-03.title: Attendance Tracking
requirements: Attendance reports by student and class

FR-04.title: Timetable Management
requirements: Create weekly timetable for each class
Assign subjects and teachers to time slots
Timetable visible to students and parents
acceptance_criteria: Timetable created with all slots filled

FR-05.title: Exam and Grade Management
requirements: Create exams with subjects, dates, and marks

FR-06.title: Fee Management
acceptance_criteria: Fee structure applies to class students

FR-07.title: Parent Portal
requirements: Parents view child's attendance and grades

FR-09.title: Library Management
requirements: Catalog books with ISBN, title, author
Student book borrowing and return tracking

FR-10.title: Transport Management
acceptance_criteria: Transport fee added to student invoice

FR-11.title: Announcement and Events
requirements: Admin publishes announcements to all or specific classes

FR-12.title: Admin Dashboard and Reports
requirements: Overview of total students, teachers, and revenue

FR-01.title: Build Enrollment API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/students/enroll (personal details, academic records). Document upload to secure storage. Payment integration for enrollment fee. Generate unique student ID on approval.

FR-01.title: Build Enrollment Form
FR-01.description: Create multi-step admission form: personal info, academic history, document uploads (drag-drop), and fee payment. Application status tracker.

FR-02.title: Build Class Management API
FR-02.description: Create CRUD for classes (grade, name), sections (class_id, name, capacity). POST /api/sections/:id/assign-teacher. Enforce capacity limits on student assignment.

FR-02.title: Build Class Management UI
FR-02.description: Create admin page with class/section tree view, add/edit dialogs, capacity indicators, and teacher assignment dropdowns.

FR-03.title: Build Attendance API
FR-03.description: Create POST /api/attendance (bulk mark for class: student_id, status, date). GET /api/attendance/report (student or class, date range). Trigger parent notification for absences.

FR-03.title: Build Attendance UI
FR-03.description: Create teacher attendance page with student list, status toggles (present/absent/late), date selector, and submit. Reports page with charts and exportable data.

FR-04.title: Build Timetable API
FR-04.description: Create POST /api/timetables (class, day, slots with subject and teacher). Conflict detection for teacher schedule. GET /api/timetables/:classId (weekly view). Publish endpoint.

FR-04.title: Build Timetable UI
FR-04.description: Create weekly grid editor with drag-drop subject/teacher assignment to slots. Conflict warnings in red. View mode for students/parents showing final timetable.

FR-05.title: Build Exam and Grade API
FR-05.description: Create CRUD for exams (name, subjects, dates, max_marks). POST /api/exams/:id/grades (bulk teacher entry). Calculate weighted averages. GET /api/students/:id/report-card (PDF generation).

FR-05.title: Build Exam and Grade UI
FR-05.description: Create exam schedule page, grade entry spreadsheet-style interface, grade report for students with charts, and downloadable PDF report card.

FR-06.title: Build Fee Management API
FR-06.description: Create POST /api/fees/structure (class-level config). Auto-generate invoices. POST /api/fees/pay. GET /api/fees/defaulters (unpaid report). Receipt generation.

FR-06.title: Build Fee Management UI
FR-06.description: Create fee structure config page, student invoice list with pay button, payment gateway integration, receipt download, and defaulter report table.

FR-07.title: Build Parent Portal API
FR-07.description: Create GET /api/parent/children (linked students). View endpoints for attendance, grades, fees. POST /api/parent/messages (to teacher). Fee payment.

FR-07.title: Build Parent Portal UI
FR-07.description: Create parent dashboard with child selector, attendance chart, grade summary, upcoming exams, fee status with pay button, and message teacher form.

FR-08.title: Build Teacher Portal API
FR-08.description: Create GET /api/teacher/classes (assigned). Attendance and grade entry endpoints. POST /api/teacher/materials (file upload). Messaging endpoints.

FR-08.title: Build Teacher Portal UI
FR-08.description: Create teacher dashboard with class list, timetable view, attendance marking, grade entry, material upload section, and parent communication inbox.

FR-09.title: Build Library API
FR-09.description: Create CRUD for books (ISBN, title, author, copies). POST /api/library/borrow, /api/library/return. GET /api/library/overdue. Search with filters.

FR-09.title: Build Library UI
FR-09.description: Create book catalog with search and filters, borrow/return buttons, student borrow history, and overdue alerts list.

FR-10.title: Build Transport API
FR-10.description: Create CRUD for routes (stops, driver, vehicle). Assign students to routes. GPS tracking endpoint. Transport fee linked to fee structure.

FR-10.title: Build Transport UI
FR-10.description: Create route management with map view, student assignment interface, live vehicle tracking map, and transport fee display in student invoices.

FR-11.title: Build Announcements API
FR-11.description: Create POST /api/announcements (title, body, target audience). CRUD for events with RSVP. Push and email notification dispatch.

FR-11.title: Build Announcements UI
FR-11.description: Create announcement feed, event calendar with detail modals and RSVP button, and admin announcement composer with audience selector.

FR-12.title: Build Admin Dashboard API
FR-12.description: Create GET /api/admin/stats (students, teachers, revenue). Enrollment trends. School-wide attendance aggregation. Custom report builder with export.

FR-12.title: Build Admin Dashboard
FR-12.description: Create dashboard with KPI cards, enrollment trend chart, attendance heat map, revenue chart, and custom report builder with filters and CSV/PDF export.
